description: Aggregates participant round-1 messages and produces the coordinator's broadcast message (cmsg1).
Assemble the pmsgs1 list from pmsg1Pool using pmsg1Indices:
Pool entries at indices 0..n-1 are well-formed messages; higher indices may be malformed.
Verify the returned cmsg1 equals expectedCmsg1.
Verify it raises an exception matching expectedError.
Error objects may include 'participant' (index of the faulty party).

errorTestCases.comment: invalid threshold value
invalid threshold value t > n
hostpubkeys list contains an invalid value
hostpubkeys list contains duplicate values
hostpubkeys list contains an infinity point
invalid pmsgs1: fewer entries than participants
invalid pmsgs1: more entries than participants
participant (index 1) message has an enc_shares list of invalid length
missing simplpedpop participant message at index 0
missing public nonce in pmsg1 (index 1)
